block-read.description: Unconditionally blocks the read tool. Enable to forbid all file reads.

block-bash.description: Unconditionally blocks the bash tool. Enable to forbid all shell command execution.

block-edit.description: Unconditionally blocks the edit tool. Enable to forbid all targeted file edits.

block-write.description: Unconditionally blocks the write tool. Enable to forbid all file creation and overwrites.

block-grep.description: Unconditionally blocks the grep tool. Enable to forbid all content searches.

block-find.description: Unconditionally blocks the find tool. Enable to forbid all filesystem searches.

block-ls.description: Unconditionally blocks the ls tool. Enable to forbid all directory listings.
